title: More Metals
description: Adds many more metals, plus many sets of armor, tools, and weapons.
body:
# **Things this mod adds:**

- Lapis Lazuli, Redstone, Amethyst, and Emerald armor, tools, and weapons (can be used for armor, tools, and weapons; Amethyst is extremely powerful, but has low durability)
- Endersteel, a new metal found in the End dimension (can be used for armor, tools, and weapons)
- Megatite, the strongest material in the game (can be used for armor, tools, and weapons)
- Ruby, found in the earth (can be used for armor, tools, and weapons)
- Tin ore and Tin blocks (cannot be used for armor and weapons)
- Platinum weapons, tools, and armor (They have some special abilities...)
- Titanium weapons, tools, and armor (They have some special abilities...)
- Rose Gold weapons, tools, and armor (They have some special abilities...)
- The Forge block, which can be used to combine metals into even more new metals. 
- Knights which spawn to provide a challenge for people with high level armor
- The Rainbow Sword, a super powerful weapon (40 damage) which can be right-clicked to summon lightning. (Costs almost all of the metals listed above, in block form)
 

## **Forge Recipies:**

- Combine Tin and Copper to make Bronze, which you can use for tools, armor, and weapons
- Combine Iron and Coal to make Steel, which you can use for tools, armor, and weapons
- Combine Gold and Copper to make Rose Gold, which you can use for tools, armor, and weapons (With some special abilities).
 

## **Types of Knights:**

- Knight: Basic, easy to kill, drops a piece of bronze. Wields Bronze sword
- Ice Knight: Spawns only in Ice Spikes and snowy biomes, is hard to kill, and drops blue ice. Wields Lapis Lazuli Sword.
- Diamond Knight: A formidable enemy, drops a diamond and wields a diamond sword
- Warden Knight: A super strong boss-knight which spawns a warden upon death. Drops an Endersteel block and wields and Endersteel sword.

**_If you want to give feedback, report bugs, or suggest ideas, email me at thingythingy59@gmail.com_**
